context_key: REST API call with null values
title: API call returns 400 due to null query parameters
symptom: When making an API call with empty input fields, the API returns a 400 Bad Request error. This occurs because the API does not accept null values for query parameters.
not_this_if: All input fields are filled with valid values
root_cause: The API expects valid query parameters and does not handle null values well. When an input field is empty, it sends a null value, which the API interprets as invalid, resulting in a 400 error.
fix_steps: Modify the API call to check if the input field is empty
Only include the query parameter in the API call if it has a valid value
Test the API call to ensure it works without returning a 400 error
agent_instruction: Check for empty input fields in the API call and exclude them from the request if they are empty.
